banner_subtitle: Clear finance. No hype. No guarantees.
description:
Professional finance explained in plain English.

Money Mechanics breaks down one financial mechanism at a time: inflation, debt, ETFs, fees, credit scores, liquidity, risk, cash flow, and long-term investing basics.

No hype, no stock picks, no get-rich promises. Just clear explanations of what money decisions actually mean.

Videos are produced with an AI-assisted workflow and reviewed for clarity before publishing.

Education only. Not financial, investment, tax, or legal advice.
default_video_description:
This Short explains a money mechanism in plain English so you can understand what the decision actually means.

Education only. Not financial, investment, tax, or legal advice.
pinned_comment_template:
The key idea: understand the mechanism before copying a rule blindly.

What money term should I break down next?

manual_studio_checklist: Set channel name to Money Mechanics if you want the recommended positioning.
Upload a clean profile icon with initials or a simple chart/wallet mark.
Upload a banner using the headline and subtitle above.
Set upload defaults description to default_video_description.
Use the paid promotion checkbox whenever a video has a sponsor, affiliate relationship, or endorsement.
Use YouTube's altered/synthetic disclosure if a realistic AI-generated scene, person, or event could mislead viewers.
Avoid luxury, get-rich, stock-pick, and guaranteed-return branding.
